zones.name: Neural Wastes
zones.ambientDescription: Cascading data streams fill the void where memories once lived.

zones.name: Crystal Valleys
zones.ambientDescription: Prismatic growths pulse with harvested energy from a thousand dead servers.

zones.name: Void Depths
zones.ambientDescription: Reality bends here, where the boundary between code and chaos dissolves.

zones.name: Singularity Core
zones.ambientDescription: The heart of everything pulses with infinite possibility.

zones.name: Transcendence
zones.ambientDescription: Beyond all boundaries, beyond all limits.

metadata.notes: Enemy definitions for procedural generation. Generator combines zone types with naming patterns to create unique enemies at any level.
